description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular layout with a large, open courtyard surrounded by a low stone or concrete wall, lush landscaping, and several palm trees. The main building is two stories tall, with a flat roof and a light beige exterior, punctuated by multiple arched windows and a central entrance. The front yard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a stone path leading to the entrance, flanked by small trees. The backyard area is spacious, with a patio, outdoor seating, and a pool or water feature, all bordered by greenery. The architectural style is minimalist with Mediterranean influences, emphasizing clean lines and open outdoor spaces. The overall design is modern yet inviting, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, arched windows, and a large landscaped courtyard featuring a pool and patio. The structure is surrounded by greenery and wooden fencing, blending Mediterranean and minimalist styles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the courtyard, pool, and patio area, with the main building and wooden fencing visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical arched windows, and the fenced front yard with a stone path and small trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear of the building, the pool, patio, and extensive landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the open courtyard, pool, patio, and the back facade of the bungalow with arched windows.
